---
title: "Data sources & attribution"
root: "."
---

## Boundaries

- **Country boundaries:** Natural Earth, 1:110m scale, provided here as GeoJSON (`data/geo/countries_110m.geojson`).
- **Continent layer:** a GeoJSON “continents” file used for the Explorer’s continent mode (`data/geo/continents.geojson`).

> Note: Always verify licensing requirements for any dataset you redistribute. Natural Earth is public domain; other layers may have different terms.

## Maps

- **Interactive mapping library:** Leaflet (loaded from CDN, pinned to v1.9.4).
- **Base map tiles:** OpenStreetMap tiles, with attribution shown on the Explorer page.

## How to update

If you replace any dataset or layer, please update this page to reflect:
- source
- license
- citation / preferred attribution
